    A

    addLResets() - Method in class model.entity.Player
    Lift reset related methods
    addPoints(int) - Method in class model.Profile
    Adds points and depending how many points the profile accumulated, it levels up (levels each 5000 points)
    addPuzzlePiece(int) - Method in class model.entity.Player
    Adds the piece on one of the puzzles and if is all the puzzles has 4 pieces then the Player has the complete password
    addRDeacts() - Method in class model.entity.Player
    Robot sleep related methods
    areActive() - Method in class model.entity.enemy.EnemyManager
     
    ATTACK - Enum constant in enum class model.entity.enemy.entities.Robot.RobotAction
     
    AUDIO_DIRECTORY - Static variable in class view.util.AudioManager
     
    AudioManager - Class in view.util
    Main manager used to save and control audios.
    AudioPlay - Class in view.util.play
    Class used to play audio of the Play
    AudioPlay() - Constructor for class view.util.play.AudioPlay
